string.name: whats_new_content
string.translation_description: HTML content listing new features in this release, shown in the What's new dialog and appended to the Help screen. Please do not change the < and > markup.

resources.string:
Sharper visuals

The horizon line is now green with a soft fade-out underneath for a more natural look, the ecliptic is more visible and now has a graduated degree scale, and we\'ve refreshed the overall color scheme.

Bug fixes

  • Fixed label flickering when pointing near the zenith or nadir
  • Added a close button to the info card for classic 3-button navigation users

string.name: beta_user_help_text
string.translation_description: HTML content shown to beta testers asking for feedback. Please do not change the < and > markup.

resources.string: Beta users wanted! Sky Map v2 is nearly here. It\'s a complete rewrite and we\'d love your early feedback. To join the beta please visit https://play.google.com/apps/testing/com.google.android.stardroid and you\'ll get v2 as soon as it\'s ready.
